title: ModelCard v1
description: Machine-readable schema for deployment-facing manifests describing intended use, exclusions, risks, and provenance of specialized adapters.

model-card/id.description: Stable identifier of the model card.

adapter/id.description: Adapter artifact described by this model card.

base-model/ref.description: Immutable base model on top of which the adapter operates.

created-at.description: Creation timestamp of the model card.

deployment/scope.description: Deployment visibility for which this card is valid.

intended-use.description: Intended use domain or task family.

out-of-scope.description: Use classes that are explicitly out of scope.

excluded-data-classes.description: Data classes explicitly excluded from the training corpus or deployment use.

known-risks.description: Known risks that operators and federations should keep visible.

evaluation/ref.description: Reference to the evaluation report that justifies publication or deployment.

provenance/refs.description: References to source corpora, jobs, or governance decisions that justify the adapter.

maintainer/refs.description: Maintainers or governors responsible for ongoing publication and revocation handling.

policy/profile.description: Deployment or governance profile associated with the model card.

status.description: Lifecycle state of the model card.

policy_annotations.description: Optional implementation-local annotations that do not change the core model-card semantics.
